text: Upon crossing the glass threshold, I feel a subtle anticipation, as if entering a sanctuary of intellect. Immersed in the R+D exhibit, vibrant colors and digital screens create an atmosphere of curiosity and forward motion. Surrounded by words, diagrams, and screens, I feel inspired, both by humanity’s ingenuity and the collective urge to understand, connect, and innovate. Each display sparks contemplation of possibility and the intricate dance between intuition and reason.
